mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_recognition_item ( record_id, line_no, product_name, specification, unit, quantity, unit_price, amount, matched_product_id, match_status, remark ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{lineNo}, #{productName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{matchedProductId}, #{matchStatus}, #{remark} )

INSERT INTO ai_recognition_item ( record_id, line_no, product_name, specification, unit, quantity, unit_price, amount, matched_product_id, match_status, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.recordId}, #{item.lineNo}, #{item.productName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.unit}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.matchedProductId}, #{item.matchStatus}, #{item.remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, record_id, line_no, product_name, specification, unit, quantity, unit_price, amount, matched_product_id, match_status, remark, created_time, updated_time FROM ai_recognition_item WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY line_no ASC, id ASC
